AgentToolConfig.description: Configuration for using an agent as a tool.

target_agent.description: The agent to expose as a tool. Must be an OpenAIAgentConfig instance.

tool_name_override.description: Override the tool name. If not provided, uses the agent's name.
tool_name_override.title: Tool Name Override

tool_description_override.description: Override the tool description. If not provided, uses the agent's description.
tool_description_override.title: Tool Description Override

is_enabled.description: Whether this agent tool is enabled.
is_enabled.title: Is Enabled
